name: T.L-Marketplace
description: Autonomous .NET development pipeline tools for Claude Code

plugins.name: T.L-AutoDevelop
plugins.description: Interactive queue-aware .NET dev orchestration. Skills: /develop, /develop-prepare, and /pipe-feedback. Task text and task files share one scheduler-driven queue.

plugins.name: T.L-AutoDevelop-Pro
plugins.description: Autonomous addon for T.L-AutoDevelop. Skill: /TLA-develop. Uses the same prepare-aware queue scheduler and auto-commits prepared merges. Requires T.L-AutoDevelop.
